raw_block:
Is the substance of things hoped for —Heb 11:1.
Is the evidence of things not seen —Heb 11:1.
Commanded —Mt 11:22;1Jo 3:23.
The objects of, are
  God. —Joh 14:1.
  Christ. —Joh 6:29;Ac 20:21.
  Writings of Moses. —Joh 5:46;Ac 24:14.
  Writings of the prophets. —2Ch 20:20;Ac 26:27.
  The gospel. —Mr 1:15.
  Promises of God. —Ro 4:21;Heb 11:13.
In Christ is
  The gift of God. —Ro 12:3;Eph 2:8;6:23;Php 1:29.
  The work of God. —Ac 11:21;1Co 2:5.
  Precious. —2Pe 1:1.
  Most holy. —Jude 1:20.
  Fruitful. —1Th 1:3.
  Accompanied by repentance. —Mr 1:15;Lu 24:47.
  Followed by conversion. —Ac 11:21.
Christ is the Author and Finisher of —Heb 12:2.
Is a gift of the Holy Spirit —1Co 12:9.
The Scriptures designed to produce —Joh 20:31;2Ti 3:15.
Preaching designed to produce —Joh 17:20;Ac 8:12;Ro 10:14,15,17;1Co 3:5.
Through it is
  Remission of sins. —Ac 10:43;Ro 3:25.
  Justification. —Ac 13:39;Ro 3:21,22,28,30;5:1;Ga 2:16.
  Salvation. —Mr 16:16;Ac 16:31.
  Sanctification. —Ac 15:9;26:18.
  Sp
